common.tagline: Android app beta testing, 25 real testers in 14 days

marketing.heroSubtitle: Your app gets downloaded by 25 managed Google accounts, used daily, and reviewed on day 14. You just watch the results.
marketing.featuresSubtitle: End to end. You enter the package name and pay. We handle the rest.
marketing.howSubtitle: 3 steps. Starts within 24 hours of payment confirmation.
marketing.pricingSubtitle: One payment per package. Full 14-day test.
marketing.legalBody: This service may violate certain terms of the Google Play Store Terms of Service. Our customer agreement details all risk sharing. Before using the service, read the.
marketing.ctaFinalSubtitle: Create an account in minutes, enter your package name, pay the fee. The system handles the rest.

managed.title: 25 managed accounts
managed.description: Each one with its own device profile (model, Android version, language, timezone). They run in parallel.

automation.title: 14-day automation
automation.description: Comfortably clears Google's 14-day closed test threshold. Daily engagement, opt-in, and download included.

live.title: Live progress
live.description: Track each account's activity, screenshots, and engagement minutes in real time from the dashboard.

reviews.title: Reviews included
reviews.description: On day 14: 10 organic-looking reviews, mixed rating. You pick the tone and language.

warming.title: Soft warming
warming.description: New accounts go through a 3-day warming period; organic behavior simulation is applied.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Payment confirmation, test start, daily summary, completion report — all by email.

how.step1Body: Type your Google Play Console package name and closed test link into the form. 1 minute.
how.step2Body: Starting at $99 — credit card, debit card. Stripe infrastructure, 3D Secure, instant confirmation.
how.step3Body: Within 24 hours, 25 accounts opt in. Daily engagement starts. Day 14: report is ready.

faqs.a1: The Google Play Console Distribution Agreement restricts automated downloads and review inflation. This service operates on the edge of those rules. Our customer agreement explains the risk sharing in detail — read it before using.
faqs.q2: How quickly does the test start?
faqs.a2: Within 24 hours of payment confirmation, opt-in and download begin. The 14-day cycle starts.
faqs.a3: Full refund before the test starts. After it starts, partial refund for unused days (up to 50%). See our refund policy.
faqs.a4: Currently Turkey, USA, and Europe. If your package is published in these countries, the test can run.
faqs.a5: Reviews are written by real accounts, but may be considered "non-organic" under Google ToS. This risk is the customer's.
faqs.a6: We apply soft warming and organic behavior simulation, but Google's algorithm changes carry risk. The Enterprise package uses rotating accounts.

auth.registerSubtitle: Start your first test in minutes
auth.name: Full name
auth.termsNotice: By signing up, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.loadingError: Tests could not be loaded. Try again in a moment.

empty.title: No tests yet
empty.description: Start your first closed test. Enter your package name and test link, pay the fee, and let the system handle the rest.

footer.tagline: Closed beta testing for Android apps
